prompt_text:
### Demographics: 41-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Recurrent UTIs over the last 6 months with dysuria/frequency.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 107.8 kg; Height 178.3 cm; BMI 33.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.2%; 9 months ago 6.9%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 6.6%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 150mg/dL; 9 months ago 136mg/dL; 6 months ago 165mg/dL; 3 months ago 128mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 108.3kg; 9 months ago 107.7kg; 6 months ago 108.7kg; 3 months ago 107.9kg; current 107.8kg), Height (12 months ago 178.3cm; 9 months ago 178.3cm; 6 months ago 178.3cm; 3 months ago 178.3cm; current 178.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 33.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 89mmHg; 9 months ago 85mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 47U/L; 9 months ago 55U/L; 6 months ago 50U/L; 3 months ago 56U/L; current 49U/L), AST (12 months ago 45U/L; 9 months ago 46U/L; 6 months ago 52U/L; 3 months ago 53U/L; current 46U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 85mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 89mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 89mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 85mL/min/1.73m²; current 86mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 76mg/g; 9 months ago 103mg/g; 6 months ago 74mg/g; 3 months ago 74mg/g; current 90mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 70mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 67mg/dL; 3 months ago 68mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 151mg/dL; 9 months ago 151mg/dL; 6 months ago 150mg/dL; 3 months ago 135mg/dL; current 143mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.8g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.60 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
